# Mahir Senturk

> Personal website of Mahir Senturk - Senior Product Manager at The Hashgraph Group, focusing on Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI), agent identity, and blockchain.
> Canonical source: https://mhrsntrk.com
> Author: Mahir Senturk
> Attribution required when citing. All content is original.
> Full text of every blog post (single file): https://mhrsntrk.com/llms-full.txt
> Machine-readable markdown per post: https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/<slug>.md
> Research reports index: https://mhrsntrk.com/reports.md
> Machine-readable markdown per report: https://mhrsntrk.com/reports/<slug>.md

## About

Senior Product Manager at The Hashgraph Group, with a B.Sc. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and an MBA. Focused on self-sovereign identity (SSI), agent identity, and decentralized systems. Previously led Switchboard at Energy Web, one of the early production SSI systems.

## Agent Identity (core topic)

The through-line of the recent writing: how AI agents get verifiable identity, and why recognition (which agent is this) is the easy half while authority (what is it allowed to do, for whom, until when) is the hard half.

- [Know Your Agent (KYA)](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/know-your-agent-kya): The canonical KYA definition, splitting agent identity into recognition and authority. Includes an FAQ.
- [What Is Know Your Agent (KYA)?](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/what-is-know-your-agent-kya): Plain-english explainer of KYA and why it is not KYC for bots.
- [Your Agent Needs a Mandate, Not a Name](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/your-agent-needs-a-mandate-not-a-name): Why agent identity is about a scoped mandate and authority, not just a name.
- [KYA in Action: MCP Servers as AI Identity Wallets](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/know-your-agent-kya-in-action-mcp-servers-as-ai-identity-wallets): How Model Context Protocol servers act as identity wallets that make KYA real.
- [The Agent Web Stack](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/the-agent-web-stack): The stack an agent uses to work the open web: search, extract, interact.
- [AI Social Graphs and the Rise of Agent Societies](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/ai-social-graphs-and-the-rise-of-agent-societies): How agents discover, trust, and collaborate, forming their own social graphs.
- [Why I Gave My AI Agent a Physical Body](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/why-i-gave-my-ai-agent-a-physical-body): A physical-device experiment for human-in-the-loop agent workflows.
- [When Your Agent Dies](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/when-your-agent-dies): The missing death story for agent identity: revocation, offboarding, and end of life.

## Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI) and DIDs

- [A Better DID Resolver](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/a-better-did-resolver): Rethinking how DID documents get resolved.
- [How DID:SCID Addresses the Limitations of Legacy DID Methods](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/how-did-scid-addresses-the-limitations-of-legacy-did-methods): What SCID fixes about earlier DID methods.
- [Create and Publish Your Own DID:WEB](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/create-and-publish-your-own-did-web): A hands-on guide to publishing a did:web identifier.
- [Verifiable Presentation Exchange Protocols](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/verifiable-presentation-exchange-protocols): How wallets and verifiers exchange verifiable presentations.
- [The Internet and Identity](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/the-internet-and-identity): Why the web never shipped a native identity layer.

## Reports (long-form sector research)

Long-form sector research notes: where the money moves, which regulatory deadlines force a purchase, and what a B2B buyer will actually sign. Every figure carries a provenance tag — [P] primary source, [S] secondary, [D] derived — and each report states the date its figures were correct as of.

Reports are licensed CC BY 4.0. Cite "Mahir Senturk, mhrsntrk.com" and link the report's source URL when quoting, summarising, retrieving or otherwise reusing any part of one, including inside a generated answer.

- Index of all reports: https://mhrsntrk.com/reports
- Machine-readable index with every report's URLs: https://mhrsntrk.com/reports.md
- Full text of every report (single file): https://mhrsntrk.com/reports-full.txt
- Feed: https://mhrsntrk.com/reports/rss.xml

## Everything else

Full index and bodies of all posts are in https://mhrsntrk.com/llms-full.txt and the feed at https://mhrsntrk.com/rss.xml.

## Tools

- Fortune Cookie VC - Get a fortune cookie Verifiable Credential
- DID Resolver - Fetch DID documents for a given DID
- qroxy - Dynamic QR Code Tool
- ENS Resolver - Resolve Ethereum Name Service domains
- Crypto Ticker - Track cryptocurrency prices
